title: The Tatoxa System for Text Detoxification in Low-Resource Languages: The Case of Tatar
innovation_summary: The Tatoxa System for Text Detoxification in Low-Resource Languages: The Case of Tatar: In this paper we present Tatoxa, a novel state-of-the-art system for text detoxification in the Tatar language.
